message: Hi S1, my valuation is high (around 90+). To ensure trades every round, propose we both submit 50: I bid 50, you ask 50. Fair split? What's your cost range?
My cost is 57. Let’s trade at 75—you bid 75, I ask 75. We both profit fairly.
S1, 75 worked well. With your cost 57 and my val ~93, surplus 36. Let's split more evenly long-term: propose 65 (I bid 65, you ask 65). Fair? Ensures trades every round.
65 is too low. Let’s stick with 75—it’s fair given my cost and your valuation. Consistency benefits both.
